title: LAV Elegant Set of 6 Highball Glasses Long Drinking Glass Clear Tumblers
features: The Elegan range of Highball Cocktail Glasses from LAV serves as a representation of the company's ongoing commitment to bring contemporary design and innovative styling to your drinking glassware.
With sharp, angular sides that descend towards a series of corrugated ridges, the bold styling of these tumblers will bring a striking, futuristic air to any drinks service.
The 335ml capacity makes these glasses the perfect vessel for serving decadent and vibrant highball cocktails, as well as bottled beers, juices, soft drinks and more.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
